schema.description:
A sparse patch of fact fields. Only the fields listed below are accepted; any other property (including `occupied` and `tenant`) is rejected with `422` — tenancy changes go through the `/pms/events/move-in` and `/pms/events/move-out` endpoints. Fields not present in the body are not touched on the unit.

At least one property is required — an empty body `{}` is rejected with `422`.

balance_due.description: Amount owed. Positive means the tenant owes money.

paid_through_date.description: Date the account is paid through.

pms_lockout.description: PMS says deny access (overlock, lien, legal hold, etc).

pms_lock_exempt.description: PMS says never lock out this tenant.

pms_unrentable.description: Unit cannot be rented (maintenance, damage, etc).

pms_status_raw.description: The PMS's original status string. Stored for audit/debugging only.

schema.title: UnitFactsPatch
